## Checklist

- [ ] Branched from `main`, not pushing directly
- [ ] CI passes (type-check, build, tests)
- [ ] No `box-shadow`, no `border-radius` (except pill badge), 2px borders everywhere
- [ ] Component exported from `packages/ui/src/index.ts` _(if new component)_
- [ ] Registry JSON created in `registry/components/` _(if new component)_
- [ ] CLI `RADIX_DEPS` entry added _(if new component)_
- [ ] Smoke test added in `packages/ui/src/test/smoke.test.tsx` _(if new component)_
- [ ] Sidebar + preview + usage updated _(if new component)_
